game.short_text: A 2D puzzle game where you play as a cat split between two dimensions, but still sharing one mind.
game.title: Entangled (Demo)

details.title: Entangled (Demo)
details.description:
Wishlist on steam! https://store.steampowered.com/app/2555350/Entangled/Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/28B43veqdz
A cat meets its quantum twin from another dimension upon escaping the cruel quantum experiment. Now there are two cats with a single mind. Guide them through their journey solving puzzles in a futuristic industrial space station.
Features:

Control two characters simultaneously
Traverse through industrial levels
Discover new tools and mechanisms
Solve increasingly complicated puzzles
Indulge in satisfying movement and sounds, accompanied with atmospheric music (headphones recommended)
No real cats are quantumly-altered during the production of this game.
Development and all assets including graphics, sounds and music are made by Atila Dogu Surucu. Idea and game design by Baran Bati and Atila Dogu Surucu.Made for GameDev.tv Game Jam 2023

game.short_text: Fling animals into portals to close them before monsters come out to eat your villagers!
game.title: Portal Panic

details.title: Portal Panic
details.description:
A fast-paced creature-slinging game made for the Gamedev.tv Game Jam 2023.
TRAILER: 

                                                                                                                                                            

                    
PORTAL PANIC:
Portals to a monster dimension have opened up over the quaint farming town of Pixelstead! Use your mouse to slingshot animals and monsters back into the portals before you become overrun. 
If the monsters eat all your villagers, you lose!  Get more lives by dragging one of each farm animal to the humans' house on the far right. 
CONTROLS :
Mouse - Left Click:  Hold down to pick up an animal, human, or monster.
Mouse - Right Click:  Release a held creature from the slingshot
CREDITS:
Programming:  Stephen Hubbard
Music/SFX:  Colyde (aka Angel Rivera)
Art:  Maya Carter (aka AmberFallStudio)

Thanks for playing~! 
Want to download the source for this project? The GitHub repo is public! Open it up in Unity and see how our game was built.
All assets (except two pixel art fonts) were created by us during this 10-day jam.
Free Assets:
Upheaval font - https://www.dafont.com/upheaval.font?l[]=10&l[]=1
Pixels font - https://www.dafont.com/ayden-snider.d892
Version 1.01

game.short_text: Shift dimensions each time you jump in this fun puzzle platformer!
game.title: Dimension Shift

details.title: Dimension Shift
details.description:
Dimension Shift
Rick-a-saurus Rex has just learned how to jump! Unfortunately for Rick-a-saurus Rex, each time he jumps the dimensional planes shift!
Help Rick-a-saurus Rex navigate 12 levels, you must collect all 3 coins to activate the portal to progress to the next level.
Look out for the easter egg hint on the game complete screen!
If you manage to get stuck (I only had this happen on level 10!) you can press keyboard key "R" or  controller button "Y / Triangle" to reset the level.
Stuck on a level? Watch the gameplay walkthrough!
Created in 2 days for the 2023 GameDev.TV game jam.
ActionKeyboardControllerMoveA / D / Left Arrow / Right ArrowLeft Thumbstick / D-PadJumpSpace / W / Up ArrowA / CrossResetRY / TriangleMenuEscapeStart / Options
Used Assets:
Platformer Walls: https://actuallyelmo.itch.io/platformer-wallsCoins: https://validifyed.itch.io/spinning-coin-sprite Character: https://arks.itch.io/dino-characters Portals: https://elthen.itch.io/2d-pixel-art-portal-sprites Generated Sound FX: https://sfxr.me/ Win / Death SFX: https://phoenix1291.itch.io/sound-effects-pack-2 Activated Portal SFX: https://gamesupply.itch.io/300-futuristic-sfx-with-names
Music: https://davidkbd.itch.io/pink-bloom-synthwave-music-pack
Roar: https://freesound.org/people/xdlxedgbrdkjgrunkk/sounds/672982/

game.short_text: Harness the Power of Light and Shadow to Escape the Temple of Shadows in this Isometric Tactics Game
game.title: The Temple Of Shadows

details.title: The Temple Of Shadows
details.description:
Overview
Embark on a captivating journey in 'The Temple of Shadows,' a grid-based isometric tactics puzzler. Awaken in a shadowy temple, surrounded by relentless shadow creatures. Discover your extraordinary ability to manipulate light, gradually unlocking a total of three light powers and three shadow powers. Strategically balance the use of these powers to outmaneuver enemies and overcome challenging levels. Piece together fragments of your past as you delve deeper into the realm, and ultimately, strive to break free and awaken from this mesmerizing, shadow-filled adventure.
Instructions
Point and click to move and cast your spells. Your turn ends when you move and cast a spell.  If an enemy touches you, the stage restarts. After stage 3 you can swap between light and shadow forms. Shadow form spells are very powerful but enemies can move two tiles instead of one so use it carefully.   The Mine spell activates at the start of your turn and explodes any nearby enemies.  When you unlock the Stun spell, it will stun enemies for 2 turns. They will change color to indicate that they cannot be stunned again.
Challenge Mode
If you're feeling up to the challenge, you can try to go through the normal levels with an added restriction on the number of turns you're allowed to use. The limit placed is my personal best so this mode is only going to be for those looking to really test their skills. 
Created in 10 days for the GameDev.Tv 2023 Game Jam

game.short_text: Navigate a robot split between two dimensions.
game.title: Split-Bot

details.title: Split-Bot
details.description:
About Split-Bot:
Play as a robot who is split between two dimensions. Navigate both dimensions simultaneously to reach the door, but don't forget the keys!
When one screen shows a platform the other might not, but both robots will interact with it. Deadly surfaces follow the same rules so be careful and pay attention to both screens.
Controls:
Up Arrow  or Space to jump
Left Arrow and Right Arrow to move left and right
Down Arrow to drop below a platform
WASD or Gamepad (D-pad) also work!


Split-Bot was created in 10 days for the GameDev.tv 2023 Game Jam
the theme was "Life in 2 Dimensions"
Credits:
Game Design by Daniel Troyer
Art Design by Christopher Troyer
Free music by alkakrab
Free sfx by Coffee Bat
Free font by Daymarius

game.title: One Voice - Canvas Defense
game.short_text: Defend your art file from corruption and restore the layers using paint tools and precision mouse skills!

details.title: One Voice - Canvas Defense
details.description:
IMPORTANT NOTICEIf you are playing with a graphics tablet, make sure you press F11 to enter non-stretched full screen mode otherwise pressing ALT will change window focus!

There is still a problem with tracking when in stretched full screen mode on some desktop and mobile devices that are not 16:9 aspect ratio.


    English
    What if a fluke accident brought your art to life? Use various art tools to defend Aria from corruption as you collect energy to restore her artwork. Play using your mouse, a graphics tablet or touch screen!
    
    If you're playing the WebGL browser version make sure to use the fullscreen button / press F11 in Chrome! The game is intended to be played in 1920x1080 resolution. There is an intended delay to the mouse tracking, but if it is feeling impossible check the calibration feature in the option screen.
    
    This game was originally created for the GameDev.tv 2023 Game Jam with the theme of 'Life in two dimensions'. It has received two major updates since then but you can still play a GameJam based version in the options featuring the original art, dialogue and stages.
    
    We hope you enjoy One Voice! You can follow us on Twitter to learn more about other games and art projects we're working on!
    
    We would also like to thank Tsuneko, who has made the Japanese localization possible with his translation work. You can follow him playing other games on itch.io here or follow him on Twitter here.
    
        Read the Postmortem
        View The Presskit
        Follow Us On Twitter
    


    日本語
    もし偶然の事故であなたのアートに命が吹き込まれたとしたら？様々なアートツールを駆使してアリアを破損から守り、彼女のアートワークを修復するためにエネルギーを集めよう。マウス、グラフィックタブレット、タッチスクリーンを使ってプレイしよう！
    
    WebGLブラウザ版をプレイする場合はフルスクリーンボタンを使用するか、ChromeでF11キーを押してください。このゲームは1920x1080の解像度でプレイすることを想定しています。マウスのトラッキングには意図的な遅延がありますが、不要だと感じた場合はオプション画面のキャリブレーション機能をチェックしてください。
    
    One Voiceはもともと2023 GameDev.tv Game Jamの一環として制作されました。ゲームジャムのテーマは「Life in two dimensions」（二次元の命）で、PixelDrakeとZzzabloによって10日間で作られました。それ以降、フィードバックを元に継続的な開発が続き、何度もアップデートを重ねてきました。当時のアリアのアート、ダイアログ、ややアンバランスなステージだったオリジナルのゲームジャムバージョンは、ほぼそのままの形で今でもオプションで選択してプレイすることが可能となっております。
    
    One Voiceを楽しんでいただければ幸いです！私達が取り組んでいる他のゲームやアートプロジェクトについては、Twitterでフォローしてください！
    
    また、日本語ローカライズを可能にしたTsunekoにも感謝します。彼がitch.ioで他のゲームをプレイしている様子はこちらから、また彼のTwitterはこちらからフォローできます。
    
        プレスキットを見る
        Twitterを訪ねる
    


    Credits + Royalty Free Assets Used
    
        Character designs and illustrations, UI tool icon artwork, general planning and more by zzzablo
        Programming, additional UI, enemy and effect design and more by PixelDrake
        Japanese translation by Tsuneko
        彗星 by 佐土原隼人
        Routine by gooset
        Recharging by gooset
        Electric Highway by チョコミント
        Reflect by まんぼう二等兵
        ぶらりんぐ in Winter by Keido Honda
        Closed park by 伊藤ケイスケ
        lazzuli luvs (Hidden Remix by ISAo feat Norico
        Computer Startup Music by Wricken
        sfx_beat.wav by MarcoHP
        mouse-click-single-00.flac by pbimal
    
One Voice was created in Unity and is provided in a zip file. No installation is needed, simply uncompress the zip file's contents and run the game! We recommend playing the WebGL version as it is the latest build.

game.short_text: 2d platform games with chill ambient and music
game.title: LeafySouls

details.title: LeafySouls
details.description:
Command: 
[A] and [D] for move.[w] to jump short. Keep pressed for long jump.[E] for interact.[space] to move both character.

Story:
The proverb says "curiosity killed the cat". Sounds like Curiosity could be a mean person. Luckily Radish doesn't even resemble said feline, in fact his curiosity brought him to pick up an odd lantern sitting in his backyard. Linked to Grim, a will-o'-the-wispish soul from different world, by a misterious chain, Radish will have to initiate a journey to another dimension where the two can be free again and return to their previous lives.
I'm not telling you that the proverb is wrong.
I'm not telling you to stick your nose where it doesn't belong to.
But maybe... just maybe... sometimes Curiosity can bring a friend.

Gameplay:
Leafy Souls is a 2d platform where you will have to control both characters in order to proceed in the adventure.The soul chain will not allow the two to be far from each other so you will have to use your wits to overcome all the difficulties youy will encounter.


Dev Team:
Developer: KebitArtist: PixeLGame Designer: Riccardo Barbieri
The game was made for the Gamejam "The GameDev.tv game jam 2023"

game.short_text: Giving the 2D world a taste of 3D.
game.title: Portals and Pastries

details.title: Portals and Pastries
details.description:
Thank you for becoming our newest owner of a Portal and Pastries bakery (more desserts are available). The bakery chain where we give the 2D world a taste of 3D.

The goal of this game is to bake the goods that the customers ask for. Sounds simple, however, you must take a portal from the 2D dimension to the 3D dimension. In the 3D dimension, there are your ingredients and your oven. Make sure not to spend to much time in the 3D dimension because at the end of the day the inspector will come and fine you if he catches you in the 3D dimension.

details.title: Eternal Duality
details.description:
Wake up and walk through the light and dark.  Seek the Sword of Remembrance  for it will guide you through the duality of one's morality. But there are those ready and willing to cease your existence from all dimensions. Let your instincts serve you now as they always have. 

The rules that bind you:
The Sword of Remembrance is your weapon, but their beacon of attackESC to take a break from dimension-hoppingWASD to traverse the planes of existenceOnly with the defeat of your enemies can you continue

Dimension Designers:

Ashley S. - 3D Art and Modeling
Lily Y. -  UX/UI and 2D Art
Dylan H. - Sound Design and Soundtrack

game.short_text: Marta's adventure
game.title: That Time in Marta's Heart

details.title: That Time in Marta's Heart
details.description:
This game was inspired by the theme "Life in 2 Dimensions" from the "GameDev.tv Jam 2023".
The theme is represented for both the visual and interior aspects of "Life in 2 Dimensions".  Like any little girl, Marta projects her inner perspective into her drawings. Through them she experiences incredible adventures but also the problems that afflict her family. Like an echo of her feelings, colorful flowers and twisted doodles come to life on her cards. It is the beginning of an adventure in which Marta will face problems bigger than her, with the strength that only a child can have in her heart.
This game was created by an Italian team of people who are passionate about exciting story-based video games.
The team was created a week before the "Team Limiting" rule was announced, at that time we had nine members willing to join the game jam. We didn't feel like excluding anyone from the group, so we decided to continue this wonderful experience together, despite the possibility of disqualification.
Il team:
  Angelica Galeone - 2D Artist & Animator - https://anariga.itch.io/
Antonello Sgnaolin - Music Composer 
Carmelo Vitale - Unity Programmer -  https://poroporostudio.itch.io/
Francesca Caizzi - Game Designer & Narrative Designer 
Gianluca Esperto - Coordinator & Sound Designer  - https://ganjochef.itch.io/
Huang Yinzheng - 2D Artist & Concept Artist - https://andrea-huang.itch.io/
Paolo Buccino - Game Designer & Narrative Designer                                              
Ratchanon Rintharuk-Unity Programmer - https://ratchrint.itch.io/
Stefano De Robertis - Coordinator & 3D Artist - https://stephderob.itch.io/
Scarica il file .rar,  aprilo ed esegui "That Time in Marta's Heart.exe".

game.title: Microcosm
game.short_text: Gamejam 2023 entry; Life in 2 Dimentions

details.title: Microcosm
details.description:
You are Clara, a curious and adventurous teenager; but you are also Dendi; a 
Dendritic cell that is part of the immune system.
One day, Clara finally went on the camping trip she always dreamed up with her 3 friends; but on her way to the bus station she cut herself.
What she did not know is that both viruses and bacteria rushed into her wound; and began multiplying at an alarming rate.
Now it is your task, little Dendritic cell; to identify the enemy; make your way to the spleen and activate the amazing powers of the adaptive immune system!
------------------------------------------------------------
Info about the game:
Made by 8 people from 3 different continents; we had a blast making it! :)(We asked the organizers about the team size and it was ok)
There are 3 upgrades: 
°Shoot (use mouse to aim and left mouse button to shoot)
°Dash upgrade (dropped from the dashing enemy) makes you dash further and allows you to dash through multiple enemies
°Squeeze upgrade - with this you can fit through tight gaps
 There are 20 enemy parts to collect scattered throughout the level; you need to return more than 18 in order to complete the game.
------------------------------------------------------------
fixed 2 game breaking bugs after launch 
- enemy parts could get stuck in wall in rare occasions 
-Win video would not play in browser (WebGL)

details.title: Welding
details.description:
About
A short first-person puzzle platformer where you rely on both eyesight and echolocation. Supports keyboard + mouse and/or gamepad.Note: The crouching button is a toggle, no need to hold it. If you play in the browser, keep in mind that Ctrl+W is a shortcut for closing tabs.
Executable builds are recommended for the best experience!
Warning: The game contains flashing/repeating light patterns that may cause discomfort/dizziness for some individuals. Skip this one if you're prone to experiencing these symptoms.
Curious how this was made? [WIP]
Check out my GitHub repos, the first one contains the entire project.
https://github.com/HamzaEzzRa/Welding---GameDevTv-2023-Jam
I'm working on a second repository, exclusive to the echolocation system, with a scene and a quick tutorial on how to use it.

When Dylan and his dog Buster run away from home, the last thing they expect to find is a giant egg sitting alone in the forest.

game.short_text: Play two different games at the same time, and try to beat both! A 2D-meets-3D experience, all within one bedroom!
game.title: Ah Crab! Mom's Coming!

details.title: Ah Crab! Mom's Coming!
details.description:
AH CRAB! MOM'S COMING!
  Two games in one, at the same time. "Ah Crab! Mom's Coming!" tasks you with playing a 2D game in your trusty Crabtendo Snips™ late at night while avoiding being caught by your mom.

  Made in just ten days for the GameDev.tv Game Jam  2023, themed Life in Two Dimensions, "Ah Crab! Mom's Coming!" is both a 3D and a 2D game set in the middle of the night, featuring a disobedient child with the uncontrollable urge to play the latest game in the Make it Snappy! series.

SIMULTANEOUS GAMEPLAY

  "Ah Crab! Mom's Coming!" consists on two games that run simultaneously. In the 3D game, you have to hide your Crabtendo Snips™ Handheld Entertainment System whenever your mom comes to check in on you to make sure you're not up late. Pay attention to the sounds and act fast to avoid getting caught!
   At any point, you can hold the Middle Mouse Button to peek over the handheld console, or press Tab to put it down. Putting the console down will pause the 2D game, but peeking won't! Keep an eye at your door - if at any time you see light coming through the gap under it, hide your console immediately!

   In the 2D game, "Make it Snappy!", you are a crab trying to escape a kitchen before you are turned into dinner! To accomplish this goal, you must collect 20 crabs scattered around the map so you can destroy the locked door, by combining your strenghts and performing The Ultimate Pinch. Be careful, however, since taking damage will destroy your entire chain of crabs!
   You can use the A and D keys to steer the crab inside the game, and once you manage to collect all 20 crabs, you'll turn into one huge crab! Avoid damage at all costs, find the exit door and hurry to escape! 
   Things like falling cleavers, burning hot pots and pans and sliding butter can hurt you pretty badly. If you have 0 crabs on your chain and take damage, you'll lose one health point. Lose three of them, and you're out! Don't worry, though: you can always restart the 2D game, but if mom catches you, you're grounded for a week!

CONTROLS
Tab - pull up / put down handheld console
Middle Mouse Button - peek over handheld console
Mouse - controls camera look when console is down
A and D - steer the crab in the 2D game
Alt + F4 - close the game


"Ah Crab! Mom's Coming!" was built from the ground up in 10 days, and no third-party assets were used.

The Team


dsydzy
Composer (Soundtrack) / Audio Designer (SFX) / 2D Artist / Video Editor / Game Designer
Carrd: justthedani.carrd.co
itch.io: dzydsy.itch.io
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/7djz8hKAB3Eid8dI8Ai4Zh

Kristin Tan
2D Artist / Concept Artist / Game Designer

details.title: Astral Lab Escape

About
You are trying to escape from the Lab. There are two buttons in every room and only pressing both of them opens the door. Your astral copy will help you with this, because he mirrors all your movements. But only you can enter the door, so don't forget to merge with your astral copy at the end.
There are only 5 levels in this game so far, so it is very short.

Controls
Moving — Left/Right Arrows; A/D;Jumping — Space/W/Up Arrow;Create an astral copy/Merge with astral copy — E/Enter;Pause the game — Esc.

game.short_text: I Accidentally Entered a Portal to the Demon Realm Becoming the Most Handsome Demon
game.title: Love and Demons (2023)

details.title: Love and Demons (2023)
details.description:
Welcome to Love and Demons, an hilarious Isekai Parody Visual Novel game where you control the fate of Maximillian, a young and naive prince who accidentally enters a portal and finds himself in a mysterious and dangerous demon realm.
In Love and Demons, you play as Maximillian, a charming but clueless prince who quickly becomes the object of desire for the demon realm's most beautiful girls.
Keep an eye on your level of coverage and carefully choose your responses, or your disguise will disappear.
Made with a custom engine in Love and Demons you can choose your own path, make decisions that will impact the story, and watch as your choices lead to different outcomes and endings. 
As you progress through the game, you'll encounter hilarious scenes, absurd puzzles, wild romance, some bugs, and a lot of bad endings.
Will you choose to fight your way through the demon realm or win the hearts of the girls who cross your path? The choice is yours.

Features
- Multiple paths and endings based on your choices
  
- 7 Unique Good Endings and a lot of Bad Endings too
- A Dice Rolling System to remain stealthy and conquer girls'  hearts
- Heart-pumping romantic comedy with beautiful girls who find Maximillian irresistible
- A unique Isekai parody story that will have you laughing out loud
Thank you for playing Love and Demons!

Wishlist Now Love and Demons Remake!



Fonts

Silver by Poppy Works, Wolfgang WozniakAvenue Pixelby  J. D. Jimenezm6x11 by Daniel Linssen

For Updates and News
Twitter 
Instagram

details.description:
Play:
Take on the role of a driver for Soul Ride, a cross-dimensional taxi service. Carry humans and demons to their destinations,  make a little money and maybe save the world?
Use the left mouse button to advance dialogue and WASD/arrow keys to hit quick time events.Made in 10 days for GameDev.tv Jam 2023: Life in two dimensions.

 Music Credits (unedited):
 
Jazzy Vibes #89 Melancholic Jazz Piano by Tri-Tachyon - https://soundcloud.com/tri-tachyon/albums
 
 Coffee Black by GrimFrenzy - https://opengameart.org/content/coffee-black
 
Dialogue Blips by nicolebutspooky - https://opengameart.org/content/dialogue-blips

moreInfo.Author: RedArtemis
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Atmospheric, Noir, Singleplayer
